---
name: Create User Test Scripts
description: Create human-run and agent-run user test scripts from journeys, MVP flows, or release candidates.
---

Create user-testing scripts for `${FEATURE_OR_RELEASE}`.

## Goal

Turn the real driver workflow into testable scripts.

## Output

Create scripts under `docs/planning/user-tests/` that include:

- purpose
- prerequisites
- ordered steps
- expected result
- evidence to capture
